name: ryu
title: Ryu
description: Chat with your local Ryu agents and search conversations, from Raycast.
author: amajor

commands.name: ask-ryu
commands.title: Ask Ryu
commands.subtitle: Ryu
commands.description: Ask your local Ryu agent a one-shot question.

commands.name: chat-ryu
commands.title: Chat with Ryu
commands.subtitle: Ryu
commands.description: Have a multi-turn conversation with your local Ryu agent.

commands.name: search-conversations
commands.title: Search Conversations
commands.subtitle: Ryu
commands.description: Browse your Ryu Core conversation history.

preferences.name: coreUrl
preferences.title: Ryu Core URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your running Ryu Core (the local backend).

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Optional bearer token if your Core was started with RYU_TOKEN.

preferences.name: defaultAgent
preferences.title: Default Agent
preferences.description: Agent id to chat with (leave blank for Core's default local model).
